'''Clode Rhoden''' owned and governed the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Yorn Skot]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. Roden made millions of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from mining [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] from the [[Yorn Skot mining station]], but also made a number of enemies. He was married to Madam [[Rhoden]], and knew of her affair with the eco-[[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]], [[Buck]]. Rhoden also owned the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]], ''[[Aurorient Express]]''.

==Biography==
In [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] went on a mission to save the ''[[Aurorient Express]]'' from sinking into the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]. They discovered that Rhoden was plotting to kill his wife by sending her in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] into the [[Yorn Skot mining station|Station]] and destroying it, then collecting insurance money by blaming the destruction on the [[Green Forge]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] group.

The Station was eventually saved from destruction, although Rhoden lost it to [[Saul Moegantz]] by [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]].
